name: Hartford Creative Group, Inc.
business: The company provides social media advertising services on platforms such as Tik Tok, Toutiao, Kwai, RED, WeChat, and Baidu. It also engages in mini-drama business, having completed its first transaction in July 2025. Revenue is generated from advertising placement services and mini-drama sales.
sellsTo: Chinese businesses seeking social media advertising
domestic Chinese customers wanting to engage international markets via TikTok

exposures.sentence: The Company begins to engage in social media advertising business on mainstream social media platforms such as Tik Tok, Toutiao, Kwai, RED, WeChat, Baidu and more.
In July 2025, the Company completed its first mini-drama transaction, generating $36,000 in revenue.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of ShaoXing HuoMao Network Technology Ltd.
catalysts.sentence: On June 18, 2024, the Company successfully completed the acquisition of ShaoXing HuoMao Network Technology Ltd. (SXHM).

catalysts.event: Establishment of subsidiary Nanjing HaoYiPeng Information Technology Ltd
catalysts.sentence: On May 12, 2025, HFZY established a subsidiary, Nanjing HaoYiPeng Information Technology Ltd ( NJHY ), based in Nanjing, China.
In July 2025, the Company completed its first mini-drama transaction, generating $36,000 in revenue.
